meaning: vi.拉屎,<俚>对...胡扯,企图欺骗,取笑vt.欺骗n.粪,屎int.狗屁!
examples: That's from the guy who shit in my pants.
If he'd been a shoemaker, I would have been a shoemaker; if he had shoveled shit, I, too, would have shoveled.
I woke up feeling like shit.
This model (paying creatives shit and expect great work) can work at select agencies, for a limited amount of time, but very few can sustain these business practices in the long term.
